_comment: Add-on surcharges applied on top of the base lens price.
_comment2: pricePerLens: cost per individual lens (multiply by quantity for total).
_comment3: confirmed: true = verified from price list or supplier. false = not yet confirmed.
_comment4: AI-updatable: when a pattern is identified from invoice data, add it here and set confirmed: false until verified.

addons.name: OPTIMA VERSION
addons.note: SV (enkelstyrke): 92 SEK/glas. Progressive (flerstyrke): 0 SEK (free). Cannot apply automatically — requires lens type check.

addons.name: STANDARD DIA., NO RE
addons.note: Standard diameter surcharge — confirm price with supplier

addons.name: SPEC.THICKNESS
addons.note: Special thickness surcharge — confirm price with supplier

addons.name: Helfärg (solid tint)
addons.source: CZV price list last page — Färg column, Helfärg row

addons.name: Gradalfärg (gradient tint)
addons.source: CZV price list last page — Färg column, Gradalfärg row

addons.name: Bicolor tint
addons.source: CZV price list last page — Färg column, Bicolor row

addons.name: NONSTANDARDGRADUATED
addons.note: Non-standard graduated design surcharge — confirm price with supplier

addons.name: THIN (special edge thickness)
addons.note: Special edge thickness surcharge — confirm price with supplier

addons.name: NO REDUCTION
addons.note: No reduction discount applied — confirm with supplier
